moves.rationale: Causal: stereo bass content below 120 Hz blurs mono compatibility for vinyl/club playback. Interactional: bass-mono frees stereo headroom for higher frequencies and tightens phase coherence. Idiomatic: standard 100-150 Hz bass-mono on bass-heavy genres.

Causal: bass center for mono compatibility and low-end power. Interactional: panning bass off-center weakens punch and risks phase issues with kick. Idiomatic: bass tracks always centered in mainstream genres.
Causal: kick center for mono punch. Interactional: kick-center + bass-center = solid low-end foundation. Idiomatic: kick is always centered in mix engineering.

cited_by.excerpt: stereo image needs low-end mono summing

rationale: Sample test drive : bass-mono Bass Rythm + center kick & bass for low-end clarity.
